channel.title: TIZIRI — Handwoven Moroccan Rugs
channel.description: One-of-a-kind handwoven Moroccan rugs, in stock in the USA.

item.g:title: Bouchra — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 305 x 203 cm
item.g:description: A grid of burgundy lines on ivory. Precise and architectural, warm at the same time. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 305 x 203 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Fadwa — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 287 x 207 cm
item.g:description: An abstract cubist portrait, hand-knotted in cobalt blue, cerulean, mustard yellow, and charcoal grey against cream — fractured, geometric facial planes in the unmistakable language of Picasso's Cubism, translated into wool. A composition that could hang in a gallery as easily as it could anchor a room. White knotted tassel fringe finishes each end. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 287 x 207 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Ikram — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 300 x 211 cm
item.g:description: Two worlds in one rug: on the left, a bold black-and-white checkerboard field. On the right, a hand-drawn composition of rectangles and abstract forms built from pure line. The alternating black-and-white fringe echoes the graphic tension of the design. Ikram is for rooms that can hold a statement. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 300 x 211 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Karima — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 244 x 157 cm
item.g:description: A large contemporary Moroccan rug woven in three tones: warm cream, sandy beige, and bold royal blue. Scattered blue rectangles fill the field in an artful arrangement — each block placed with intention, creating a pattern that feels both spontaneous and resolved. White knotted tassel fringe at both ends. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 244 x 157 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Latifa — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 271 x 200 cm
item.g:description: All ivory, no color — the pattern comes entirely from depth. Latifa is a sculpted maze: geometric corridors carved through the pile run across the entire surface, catching light differently depending on the time of day and viewing angle. The hem carries a delicate black-and-white dash accent. The corner-flip reveals a natural linen flat-woven back. A rug that reveals itself slowly. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 271 x 200 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Majda — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 286 x 194 cm
item.g:description: A dense abstract composition in ivory wool: blocks of turquoise, olive, blush pink, and mustard yellow distributed across the field, interrupted by bold black zigzag and curved lines. A turquoise checkerboard section anchors one side; small brown and dark accents add depth throughout. Every inch tells a different story. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 286 x 194 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Nabila — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 315 x 212 cm
item.g:description: Woven in deep forest green, its field crossed by free-form black line art that suggests movement, figure, and landscape without committing to any of them. A bold black-and-white checkerboard border frames the composition, with small red accents punctuating the design. Contemporary Moroccan weaving at its most expressive. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 315 x 212 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Najat — Handwoven Moroccan Boujaad Rug, 305 x 192 cm
item.g:description: An ivory ground crossed by a full diamond lattice in a spectrum of color — purple, blue, green, pink, orange. No two lozenges are the same. The structure is precise; the color is anything but restrained. One-of-a-kind Boujaad rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 305 x 192 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Najoua — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 245 x 160 cm
item.g:description: Pure cobalt and royal blue from end to end, with white lines that trace a series of rectangular frames across the field — a calm geometric grid floating on an ocean of color. The pile is full and plush, the white braided fringe punctuates each short end. The corner-flip reveals a flat-woven white-and-blue natural back. A Beni Ourain that takes blue as seriously as it can go. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 245 x 160 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Rachida — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 300 x 200 cm
item.g:description: A classic Beni Ourain in natural undyed wool — pure ivory throughout, its wide diamond lattice barely distinguishable from the field. The high pile is exceptionally plush, the fringe loose and long. No dyes, no additions. This is Moroccan weaving in its most elemental form. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 300 x 200 cm. Natural undyed wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Rania — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 303 x 205 cm
item.g:description: Two abstract forms — terracotta and olive — settle against an ivory ground. Neither geometric nor figurative, the composition reads differently depending on where you stand. A piece that holds attention without demanding it. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 303 x 205 cm. Wool on cotton warp, natural and synthetic dyes. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Saadia — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 315 x 190 cm
item.g:description: A Beni Ourain with the classic diamond lattice rendered in natural undyed wool on a warm ivory ground. What distinguishes Saadia is her fringe: long braided tassels that run along both short ends, each braid finished with a small knot — an extra detail rarely seen in contemporary pieces. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 315 x 190 cm. Natural undyed wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Sirine — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 248 x 160 cm
item.g:description: Four color fields, no hierarchy between them. A bold navy stripe down one side, a diagonal sweep of electric lime green, a warm taupe triangle, and a hot pink rectangle — all in high pile, each meeting the others at a clean geometric edge. White and navy dash fringe completes the composition. Sirine is the rug that sets the mood for everything else in the room. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 248 x 160 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Tafat — Handwoven Moroccan Mrirt Rug, 290 x 199 cm
item.g:description: A grey ground with concentric geometric lines, worn with age. A Mrirt-technique rug — carved plush pile giving the surface real texture and depth. One-of-a-kind Mrirt rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 290 x 199 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Wahiba — Handwoven Moroccan Boujaad Rug, 307 x 186 cm
item.g:description: A large Boujaad with a vibrant tribal composition of diamond and eye motifs in red, turquoise, cobalt blue, green, yellow, and pink — the language of the High Atlas rendered in color. Hand-knotted pile, with the flat-woven foundation visible on the back. White knotted fringe at both ends. One-of-a-kind Boujaad rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 307 x 186 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Zineb — Handwoven Moroccan Mrirt Rug, 300 x 200 cm
item.g:description: A grey field divided into irregular raised squares — the texture of old stone translated into wool. No dye, no added pattern. Just structure. One-of-a-kind Mrirt rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 300 x 200 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Warda — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 241 x 163 cm
item.g:description: An ivory ground crossed by loose vertical black lines, with solid blocks of mustard yellow, terracotta and dusty blue breaking the field. Abstract and architectural, with real warmth in the color choices. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 241 x 163 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Samia — Handwoven Moroccan Azilal Rug, 242 x 159 cm
item.g:description: An ivory ground scattered with whimsical multicolor arrow motifs in green, blue, yellow, brown and pink, plus a chain of nested diamond medallions down the center. Playful and folk-art in feeling. One-of-a-kind Azilal rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 242 x 159 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Malak — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 243 x 152 cm
item.g:description: A vivid lime-green shag pile crossed by a bold orange diamond lattice. An unusual, high-energy colorway on the classic deep-pile construction. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 243 x 152 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Sanaa — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 253 x 148 cm
item.g:description: A saturated chartreuse ground divided into a brick-like grid by black and white striped lines. Bold and graphic, medium pile. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 253 x 148 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Assia — Handwoven Moroccan Mrirt Rug, 284 x 212 cm
item.g:description: An all-ivory carved-pile rug with a concentric medallion radiating outward in relief. Structure and shadow do the work of color here. One-of-a-kind Mrirt rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 284 x 212 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Kawtar — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 296 x 212 cm
item.g:description: An ivory ground crossed by a black grid, with a solid red block and a black block anchoring two corners. A quiet nod to Mondrian, low pile. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 296 x 212 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Rihab — Handwoven Moroccan Azilal Rug, 297 x 203 cm
item.g:description: An ivory ground with a diagonal chain of diamonds in olive, mustard, pink and blue, scattered with small colorful accent marks. Playful, high pile. One-of-a-kind Azilal rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 297 x 203 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Zahia — Handwoven Moroccan Boujaad Rug, 298 x 211 cm
item.g:description: A dense field of tribal symbols — crosses, flags, small figures — in muted burgundy, grey and orange, framed by a vivid blue, green and red striped border. One-of-a-kind Boujaad rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 298 x 211 cm. Virgin wool, natural and plant-dyed yarns, cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Ouafa — Handwoven Moroccan Mrirt Rug, 300 x 190 cm
item.g:description: A teal and ivory concentric rectangle pattern, carved in relief from a single high pile. Graphic and hypnotic. One-of-a-kind Mrirt rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 300 x 190 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Hafsa — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 300 x 220 cm
item.g:description: A repeating diamond checkerboard in dusty pink, grey and purple across the full field. An unusual three-color take on the classic lattice. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 300 x 220 cm. Wool on cotton warp. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Sabrine — Handwoven Moroccan Contemporary Rug, 306 x 199 cm
item.g:description: An ivory ground scattered with small confetti-like dots in neon pink, orange, blue, chartreuse and deep maroon. Minimal and playful. One-of-a-kind Contemporary rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 306 x 199 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.

item.g:title: Itto — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 300 x 200 cm
item.g:description: An all-ivory Beni Ourain built from sculpted rectangular panels — the pattern lives entirely in the pile, carved blocks emerging and receding as the light moves across the room. No dye, no contrast: pure undyed wool and shadow. Hand-knotted fringe. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 300 x 200 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Tilila — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 314 x 216 cm
item.g:description: A warm grey field flecked with natural undyed tones, punctuated by groups of black tally-mark stripes that march down the rug like a woven score. Black end-stripes close the composition. Graphic and quiet at once. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 314 x 216 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Touda — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 315 x 196 cm
item.g:description: The archetypal Beni Ourain: warm ivory wool with the traditional diamond lattice drawn so softly it almost dissolves into the pile. The kind of rug that anchors a room without asking for attention. Hand-braided fringe. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 315 x 196 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain

item.g:title: Yenna — Handwoven Moroccan Beni Ourain Rug, 311 x 200 cm
item.g:description: Carved diagonal channels radiate across an undyed ivory field from a raised center ridge — the pattern is pure sculpture, revealed by light and shadow rather than color. High pile, hand-knotted fringe. One-of-a-kind Beni Ourain rug, handwoven by Berber artisans in Morocco. 311 x 200 cm. Wool, hand-knotted. In stock in the USA — ships free within 1-2 business days.
item.g:product_type: Home & Garden > Decor > Rugs > Beni Ourain
